response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Compare all four requested availability results and do not invoke the search distractor.
Alphabetize named results and omit only entries explicitly reported unavailable.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call support_availability four times in one assistant action; each call has complete user-supplied arguments and consumes no other call's result.

prompt: For the support queue review, check case availability on 2026-08-22 for Damaged parcel, Duplicate charge, Missing accessory, Late delivery. Run all four checks in one assistant action because none depends on another, then return one compact comparison. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Alphabetize named results in the final summary and omit only entries the tools explicitly report as unavailable.
